mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_IDX, MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, MEMBER_NAME, BIRTH, EMAIL, PHONE_NUM, ADDRESS, ELITE, USE_HAND, HOPE_POSITION, MEMBER_REGDATE FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = LOWER(#{member_id})

SELECT DISTINCT M.MEMBER_IDX MEMBER_IDX, M.MEMBER_ID MEMBER_ID, M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, M.BIRTH BIRTH, M.EMAIL EMAIL, M.PHONE_NUM PHONE_NUM, M.ADDRESS ADDRESS, M.ELITE ELITE, M.USE_HAND USE_HAND, M.HOPE_POSITION HOPE_POSITION, M.MEMBER_REGDATE MEMBER_REGDATE FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN MEMBER_TEAM MT ON M.MEMBER_IDX = MT.MEMBER_IDX LEFT JOIN TEAM T ON MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1
AND LOWER(M.MEMBER_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND LOWER(T.TEAM_NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY M.MEMBER_IDX
